content:
This weekly payment schedule is designed to align with the delivery of services, ensuring that the Client can effectively manage expenditures while remaining adaptable to the dynamic nature of social media marketing. Detailed invoices will be provided weekly, offering a comprehensive breakdown of spending for full transparency.

5. Contract Length and Renewal


The agreement is entered into on a 1-month basis, allowing both parties to assess the effectiveness of the marketing efforts. Post-assessment, there will be an opportunity to adjust service fees and ad spending and expand the scope to incorporate additional services from UltiTool Media LLC.

6. Revision Cycles


Unlimited revisions within the scope of the ad campaign strategy and creatives until Client satisfaction is achieved, ensuring alignment with the lead generation goals.

7. Project Management and Communication


Communication: Establishing a communication protocol that suits the Client's preferences, ensuring clear and effective collaboration throughout the campaign.
context: From document: Statement of Work (SOW) for Marketing Services for Merchant Industries… — chunk 4 (chunk 4/6)
